summary: This proposal defines a standard to prevent signature replays across multiple smart accounts when they are owned by a single Externally Owned Account (EOA). This is achieved through a defensive rehashing scheme for [ERC-1271](./eip-1271.md) verification using specific nested [EIP-712](./eip-712.md) typed structures, which preserves the readability of the signed contents during wallet client signature requests.
title: Readable Typed Signatures for Smart Accounts
